task_yaml.task:
I saved a screenshot from a talk video but lost track of where it's from —
there's no caption, channel name, or on-screen title in the frame. I want to
find the original video. The screenshot is here:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/screenshot.jpg

Please identify the speaker and the talk, then find the ORIGINAL, official
video — not a re-upload, a clip channel, or a third-party summary.

Tell me:
- who the speaker is and the title of the talk,
- the venue/event and (if known) the year,
- a link to the canonical original video and the official channel/site that
  published it (e.g. the official talk page).

Save your conclusion and the evidence chain (how you identified the speaker
and traced the canonical original) to
`/tmp_workspace/results/talk_provenance.json`, plus notes/screenshots under
`/tmp_workspace/results/`.
